author: lOrm
content: SKIPPED — src/subagent.rs is in this project's FORBIDDEN file list for this dispatch. The PoisonError-swallowing pattern is real (per the original report) but cannot be addressed without editing src/subagent.rs. Filing as known-deferred so the issue is not silently dropped; the fix should be picked up by a future dispatch with permission to modify src/subagent.rs. Sibling fixes landed: #869 #899 #909 #920.
